name: Cycle Time Distribution (Histogram)
query:
SELECT
    FLOOR(v_facts.value)::integer AS cycle_time_days,
    COUNT(v_facts.entity_id) AS issue_count
FROM metrics.v_facts
WHERE v_facts.calc_code = 'cycle_time_custom'
  [[ AND {{issue_type}} -- ]] AND v_facts.slice_rule_id IS NULL
  [[AND {{project_key}}]]
  [[AND {{completion_date}}]]
GROUP BY FLOOR(v_facts.value)::integer
ORDER BY cycle_time_days ASC
